input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.6.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.6.2
            TITLE: high pressure injection (hpi) / direct injection (di)

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.6.2: High Pressure Injection (HPI) / Direct Injection (DI)
IC.6.2 High Pressure Injection (HPI) / Direct Injection (DI)

RULE: ic.6.2.6
            TITLE: pressure regulator – must be fitted between the high pressure and low pressure sides of the

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.6.2.6: Pressure Regulator – must be fitted between the High Pressure and Low Pressure sides of the
IC.6.2.6 Pressure Regulator – must be fitted between the High Pressure and Low Pressure sides of the 
fuel system in parallel with the DI boost pump.  The external regulator must be used even if 
the DI boost pump comes equipped with an internal regulator.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 87 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

RULE: ic.6.2.5
            TITLE: high pressure fuel pump – must be rigidly mounted to structural engine components such as

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.6.2.5: High Pressure Fuel Pump – must be rigidly mounted to structural engine components such as
IC.6.2.5 High Pressure Fuel Pump – must be rigidly mounted to structural engine components such as 
the cylinder head or engine block.

RULE: ic.6.2.2
            TITLE: all high pressure fuel lines must:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.6.2.2: All High Pressure Fuel Lines must:
IC.6.2.2 All High Pressure Fuel Lines must:  
a. Be stainless steel rigid line or Aeroquip FC807 smooth bore PTFE hose with stainless steel 
reinforcement and visible Nomex tracer yarn.  Equivalent products may be used with 
prior approval.   
b. Not incorporate elastomeric seals 
c. Be rigidly connected every 100 mm by mechanical fasteners to structural engine 
components such as cylinder heads or block

RULE: ic.6.2.3
            TITLE: any low pressure flexible fuel lines must be one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.6.2.3: Any Low Pressure flexible Fuel Lines must be one of:
IC.6.2.3 Any Low Pressure flexible Fuel Lines must be one of: 
• Metal braided hose with threaded fittings (crimped on or reusable) 
• Reinforced rubber hose with some form of abrasion resistant protection

final_answer: rule IC.6.2: High Pressure Injection (HPI) / Direct Injection (DI)
